revision.comment: Bot: mark 1 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24017044590|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月十五]][[zh:四月十五]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 15|qq=April 15}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}} . == Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|qid=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 21st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|802|en|802|qid=Q29992|lt=802|1=802}} {{ill|May 19|en|May 19|qid=Q2578|lt=May 19|1=May 19}} ) – The chieftain of the {{ill|Ezo|1=Emishi|2=ja|3=蝦夷|ja|Ezo|1=Ezo|2=ja|3=蝦夷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ezo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q932574}} , {{ill|Aterui|en|Aterui|qid=Q1088046|lt=Aterui|1=Aterui}} , surrendered to the {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Seii Taishōgun|1=Shogun}} {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|en|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|qid=Q941979|lt=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|1=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro}} . * {{ill|Jōgan|en|Jōgan|qid=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|859|en|859|qid=Q23897|lt=859|1=859}} {{ill|May 20|en|May 20|qid=Q2579|lt=May 20|1=May 20}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Ten'an|en|Ten'an|qid=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} to Jōgan via an {{ill|era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}} . * {{ill|Engi (era)|en|Engi (era)|qid=Q1374325|lt=Engi|1=Engi (era)}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|905|en|905|qid=Q24239|lt=905|1=905}} {{ill|May 21|en|May 21|qid=Q2580|lt=May 21|1=May 21}} ) – By the orders of {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|qid=Q329753|lt=Emperor Daigo|1=Emperor Daigo}} , {{ill|Ki no Tsurayuki|en|Ki no Tsurayuki|qid=Q468288|lt=Ki no Tsurayuki|1=Ki no Tsurayuki}} and others began the compilation of {{ill|Kokin Wakashū|en|Kokin Wakashū|qid=Q1047167|lt=Kokin Wakashū|1=Kokin Wakashū}} . * {{ill|Eikan|en|Eikan|qid=Q1327084|lt=Eikan|1=Eikan}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|983|en|983|qid=Q23934|lt=983|1=983}} {{ill|May 29|en|May 29|qid=Q2589|lt=May 29|1=May 29}} ) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Tengen (era)|en|Tengen (era)|qid=Q1327101|lt=Tengen|1=Tengen (era)}} to Eikan via an {{ill|era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}} . * {{ill|Tenpuku|en|Tenpuku|qid=Q1194452|lt=Tenpuku|1=Tenpuku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1233|en|1233|qid=Q5421|lt=1233|1=1233}} {{ill|May 25|en|May 25|qid=Q2585|lt=May 25|1=May 25}} ) – Due to an earthquake, the era name was changed from {{ill|Jōei|en|Jōei|qid=Q1194168|lt=Jōei|1=Jōei}} to Tenpuku via an {{ill|era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}} . * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1716|en|1716|qid=Q6892|lt=1716|1=1716}} {{ill|June 4|en|June 4|qid=Q2627|lt=June 4|1=June 4}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} issued a decree on the names of the Five Routes, including {{ill|Tōkaidō (region)|en|Tōkaidō (region)|qid=Q1196306|lt=Tōkaidō|1=Tōkaidō (region)}} , {{ill|Nakasendō|en|Nakasendō|qid=Q1154479|lt=Nakasendō|1=Nakasendō}} , {{ill|Nikkōdōchū|ja|日光道中|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikkōdōchū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日光街道|1=Nikkō Kaidō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q511576}} , {{ill|Ōshūdōchū|ja|奥州道中|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōshūdōchū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 奥州街道|1=Ōshū Kaidō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1132663}} , and {{ill|Kōshūdōchū|ja|甲州道中|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshūdōchū|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 甲州街道|1=Kōshū Kaidō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1156682}} . * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1730|en|1730|qid=Q6957|lt=1730|1=1730}} {{ill|May 31|en|May 31|qid=Q2591|lt=May 31|1=May 31}} ) – The {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} suspended the {{ill|Shōbei no Sei|ja|上米の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōbei no Sei|1=Shōbei no Sei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4057193}} and restored the interval of {{ill|Sankin-kōtai|en|Sankin-kōtai|qid=Q1151844|lt=Sankin-kōtai|1=Sankin-kōtai}} to its original one-year cycle. == Births == * {{ill|Kyūju|en|Kyūju|qid=Q1194205|lt=Kyūju|1=Kyūju}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1155|en|1155|qid=Q19650|lt=1155|1=1155}} {{ill|May 17|en|May 17|qid=Q2575|lt=May 17|1=May 17}} ) – {{ill|Jien|en|Jien|qid=Q715993|lt=Jien|1=Jien}} , a monk of {{ill|Tiantai|en|Tiantai|qid=Q668188|lt=Tendai Buddhism|1=Tiantai}} and a {{ill|waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/waka poet|qq=}} (d. {{ill|1225|en|1225|qid=Q5403|lt=1225|1=1225}} ). * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|qid=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1847|en|1847|qid=Q7644|lt=1847|1=1847}} {{ill|May 29|en|May 29|qid=Q2589|lt=May 29|1=May 29}} ) – {{ill|Naitō Meisetsu|ja|内藤鳴雪|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naitō Meisetsu|1=Naitō Meisetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11394580}} , a {{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Q135490197|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|qid=DELETED_QID|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. {{ill|1926|en|1926|qid=Q5259|lt=1926|1=1926}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|May 18|en|May 18|qid=Q2576|lt=May 18|1=May 18}} ) – {{ill|Minakata Kumagusu|en|Minakata Kumagusu|qid=Q6862791|lt=Minakata Kumagusu|1=Minakata Kumagusu}} , a {{ill|Botany|en|Botany|qid=Q441|lt=botanist|1=Botany}} and {{ill|Folklore studies|en|Folklore studies|qid=Q132116|lt=folklorist|1=Folklore studies}} (d. {{ill|1941|en|1941|qid=Q5231|lt=1941|1=1941}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Kinmei|en|Emperor Kinmei|qid=Q329792|lt=Emperor Kinmei|1=Emperor Kinmei}} 33rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|571|en|571|qid=Q30475|lt=571|1=571}} {{ill|May 24|en|May 24|qid=Q2584|lt=May 24|1=May 24}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kinmei|en|Emperor Kinmei|qid=Q329792|lt=Emperor Kinmei|1=Emperor Kinmei}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} , the 29th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor|1=Emperor of Japan}} . == Commemorations == * {{ill|Buddha's Birthday|en|Buddha's Birthday|qid=Q5348941|lt=Buddha Bathing Festival|1=Buddha's Birthday}} (Southeast Asia and South Asia)
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|14|4|16|3|15|5|4|0415|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 4월 15일]] [[ja:4月15日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:四月十五]]
